ScenarioName: # - ScenarioName: Name of the climate scenario (string
# - Year: Year for which the driver value applies (integer
# - Driver: Name of the climate/economic driver (string
# - Region: Geographic region for the driver (string
Year: use "Global" for worldwide drivers or specific region)

ScenarioName: # - Value: Raw value of the driver in scenario units (numeric)
# - StandardizedValue: Standardized value (φ) in sigma units (numeric
# - Notes: Optional notes about the data source or assumptions (string)
# - EnergyPrice: Energy price index (relative to baseline)
# - GDPDeviation: GDP growth deviation from baseline (percentage points)
# - FloodSeverity: Flood hazard severity index (0-1 scale or standard deviations)
# - StormSeverity: Storm/cyclone severity index (0-1 scale or standard deviations)
# - HeatDroughtSeverity: Combined heat stress and drought index (0-1 scale or standard deviations)
# - Where Sigma is chosen as cross-scenario dispersion or a defined "typical move"
# - Interpretation: StandardizedValue = 1.5 means "1.5 sigma above baseline"
